---
title: "Pet Adoption"
author: "Amelia Humphrey"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Pet Adoption

By: Amelia Humphrey 

Data Description:

Pet Adoption: <https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/rabieelkharoua/predict-pet-adoption-status-dataset> 

This dataset has information about factor that can lead to pet adoption and how long a pet stays in a shelter.

We do foresee a lot of data cleaning. We will be checking for missing values, duplicates, and outliers that could skew the data. 


Some summaries we plan to explore are the average between the different type of pet like dog and cat.
